headline: Quest Diagnostics Incorporated (DGX) Hits Fresh High: Is There Still Room to Run?
summary: Quest Diagnostics (DGX) is at a 52-week high, but can investors hope for more gains in the future? We take a look at the company's fundamentals for clues.
